name: Breathe HR
description: HR software for SMEs. Monitor employee records and leave management.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Breathe HR
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Generate a new API key
4. Copy and paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Breathe HR → Settings → API Keys → Generate New Key.

checks.name: Breathe HR App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Breathe HR API is accessible.
